title: Weather: Yellow level 2 warning for rough seas
description: GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - The South...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - The South African Weather Service has issued a Yellow level 2 warning for rough seas leading to possible localised damage to coastal infrastructure, expected between Lambert's Bay and Plettenberg Bay today, spreading to Alexander Bay by Saturday evening and persisting on Sunday.


> Regional weather forecast:


Western CapePartly cloudy and cool to cold, with isolated showers and rain over the western and south-western parts. The wind along the coast will be fresh to strong westerly to north-westerly,reaching gale along the south-west coast in the evening. The expected UVB sunburn index: Very High

Western half of the Eastern CapeMorning fog patches in places in the south, otherwise Partly cloudy, windy and cool. The wind along the coast will be fresh to strong south-westerly.

Eastern half of the Eastern CapeMorning fog patches in places south of the escarpment, otherwise fine and cool but partly cloudy along the coast. The wind along the coast will be light north-westerly, becoming moderate to fresh south-westerly towards midday.


> Expected temperatures:



> Weekend forecast:


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
